final:
module top_module(
    input [3:0] in_data,
    input in_enable,
    output reg [3:0] out_data,  // Changed to reg type
    output reg out_enable        // Changed to reg type
);reg [3:0] stored_data;

always @(*) begin
  if (in_enable) begin stored_data <= in_data ; out_enable <= 1 ; end else begin out_enable <= 0 ; end
  end

  always @(*) begin
  out_data <= stored_data ;
  end

endmodule
